upgrade.title: Upgrade Your Plan
upgrade.description: Choose the perfect plan for your needs. Upgrade to unlock premium features.
upgrade.needHelp: Need help choosing the right plan?
upgrade.needHelpDescription: Our team is ready to help you find the perfect plan for your needs.
upgrade.faqCancel: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
upgrade.faqCancelAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your plan will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle.
upgrade.faqUpgrade: How do I upgrade my plan?
upgrade.faqUpgradeAnswer: You can upgrade your plan by selecting the plan you want and clicking the 'Upgrade' button.
upgrade.faqTrial: Is there a free trial for premium plans?
upgrade.faqTrialAnswer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for our Premium plan. No credit card required.
upgrade.faqPayment: What payment methods do you accept?
upgrade.faqPaymentAnswer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.
upgrade.faqBilling: Can I switch between monthly and annual billing?
upgrade.faqBillingAnswer: Yes, you can switch between monthly and annual billing at any time.
upgrade.requiresPremium: This feature requires a premium subscription.
upgrade.upgradeToUnlock: Upgrade to Premium to unlock this feature
upgrade.unlimitedGoalsDesc: Create and track as many financial goals as you need
upgrade.advancedReportsDesc: Get detailed insights with advanced financial reports
upgrade.debtPayoffPlannerDesc: Optimize your debt payoff strategy with our planner
upgrade.investmentTrackingDesc: Track your investments and portfolio performance
upgrade.billRemindersDesc: Never miss a payment with automated bill reminders

landing.heroSubtitle: Track expenses, set budgets, and achieve your financial goals with our easy-to-use budgeting tool.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your money
landing.expenseTrackingDesc: Easily log and categorize your expenses to see where your money is going.
landing.budgetPlanningDesc: Create custom budgets for different categories and track your progress.
landing.financialGoalsDesc: Set savings goals and track your progress toward achieving them.
landing.testimonial1: "Budget Genius has completely changed how I manage my finances. I've saved more in the last 3 months than I did all of last year!"
landing.testimonial2: "The visual reports make it so easy to see where my money is going. I've cut unnecessary expenses and increased my savings rate."
landing.testimonial3: "As a freelancer with irregular income, Budget Genius helps me plan for lean months and save during abundant ones. Game changer!"
landing.finalCta: Ready to take control of your finances?
landing.finalCtaDesc: Join thousands of users who have transformed their financial lives with Budget Genius.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free plan available with premium upgrades.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.pageDescription: Interested in Budget Genius for your organization? Fill out the form and our sales team will get back to you shortly.
contact.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Bank-level encryption and security protocols to protect your financial data.
contact.teamCollaborationDesc: Multi-user access with customizable permissions for finance teams.
contact.advancedReportingDesc: Comprehensive financial reports and dashboards for better decision-making.
contact.dedicatedSupportDesc: Priority support with a dedicated account manager for enterprise customers.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your needs and requirements...
contact.responseTime: A member of our sales team will reach out to you within 24 hours.
contact.legalAgreement: By submitting this form, you agree to our
contact.privacyPolicyLead: At Budget Genius, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
contact.privacyInfoCollectIntro: We collect information that you provide directly to us when you:
privacyInfoCollectList: Create an account and use our services
contact.privacyHowWeUseIntro: We use the information we collect to:
privacyHowWeUseList: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Send you technical notices and support messages
Respond to your comments and questions
Generate personalized financial insights and recommendations
Detect and prevent fraudulent or unauthorized activity
contact.privacyAIIntro: Budget Genius uses artificial intelligence and machine learning to analyze your financial data and provide personalized insights. Our AI systems:
privacyAIList: Analyze spending patterns to categorize transactions
Predict future expenses based on historical data
contact.privacyAIClosing: We train our AI models on anonymized, aggregated data. Your individual financial data is never shared with other users or third parties without your explicit consent.
contact.privacyDataSecurityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized or unlawful processing, accidental loss, destruction, or damage. We use industry-standard encryption for data in transit and at rest.
contact.privacyDataRetentionBody: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
contact.privacyYourRightsIntro: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including:
privacyYourRightsList: The right to access and receive a copy of your personal information
The right to rectify or update your personal information
The right to delete your personal information
The right to restrict or object to our processing of your personal information
contact.privacyChangesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
contact.privacyContactBody: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
contact.privacyContactAddress: Budget Genius Inc., 123 Financial Street, Suite 100, San Francisco, CA 94107
contact.tosLead: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Budget Genius, including our website, mobile applications, and services (collectively, the "Service"). Please read these Terms carefully before using our Service.
contact.tosAcceptanceBody: By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.
contact.tosChangesBody: We may modify these Terms at any time. If we make changes, we will provide notice of such changes, such as by sending an email notification, providing notice through the Service, or updating the "Last Updated" date at the beginning of these Terms. Your continued use of the Service following notification of changes will constitute your acceptance of such changes.
contact.tosAccountRegistrationBody: To use certain features of the Service, you must register for an account. When you register, you agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information about yourself and to update such information as necessary. You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
contact.tosFinancialDataBody: Budget Genius may allow you to connect your financial accounts from third-party financial institutions. By connecting these accounts, you authorize Budget Genius to access and store your account information. You acknowledge that:
tosFinancialDataList: Budget Genius does not review your financial data for accuracy
Budget Genius is not responsible for the products and services offered by third-party financial institutions
You are responsible for complying with the terms and conditions of your agreements with third-party financial institutions
contact.tosAIBody: Budget Genius uses artificial intelligence to analyze your financial data and provide insights and recommendations. You acknowledge that:
tosAIList: AI-generated insights are for informational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice
You should consult with qualified financial professionals before making significant financial decisions
AI predictions and recommendations are based on historical data and may not accurately predict future outcomes
contact.tosUserContentBody: You retain all rights to any content you submit, post, or display on or through the Service ("User Content"). By submitting User Content, you grant Budget Genius a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, and display such User Content for the purpose of providing and improving the Service.
tosProhibitedConductList: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of any laws
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service or other users' accounts
Interfere with or disrupt the Service or servers connected to the Service
Circumvent, disable, or otherwise interfere with security-related features of the Service
Use the Service to store or transmit malicious code or viruses
Use automated means to access or use the Service without our permission
contact.tosTerminationBody: We may terminate or suspend your access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including if you breach these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.
contact.tosDisclaimerBody: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMISSIBLE UNDER APPLICABLE LAW, BUDGET GENIUS DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
contact.tosLimitationBody: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, BUDGET GENIUS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, RESULTING FROM YOUR ACCESS TO OR USE OF OR INABILITY TO ACCESS OR USE THE SERVICE.
contact.tosGoverningLawBody: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of California, without respect to its conflict of laws principles. Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms or your use of the Service shall be brought exclusively in the state or federal courts located in San Francisco County, California.
contact.tosContactBody: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
contact.tosContactAddress: Budget Genius Inc., 123 Financial Street, Suite 100, San Francisco, CA 94107
